data.question: Does this ECG show ST elevation in at least two of the anterior leads, including leads V1, V2, V3, and V4?

Does this ECG show pathological Q waves in at least two of the anterior leads, including leads V1, V2, V3, and V4? Note that a pathological Q wave in these leads is defined as (1) a Q wave with a duration greater than 30 milliseconds and an amplitude greater than 0.075mV, or (2) a deep S wave with only a small R wave preceding it.
